document_meta.file_name: SOFTWARE SERVICES AGREEMENT AND DATA HANDLING TERMS.pdf

controls.title: Data Fiduciary / Data Processor Role Clarity
missing_elements: organization is the data fiduciary or equivalent principal controller
vendor acts only as processor or equivalent service provider on behalf of the organization under contract
vendor cannot determine the purpose or means of processing independently
vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: organization is the data fiduciary or equivalent principal controller.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: organization is the data fiduciary or equivalent principal controller.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, outsourcing risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Strict Purpose Limitation and Lawful Instruction Control
found_elements: processing is limited to the specified purpose, agreed services, and documented instructions or lawful basis determined by the organization
vendor must notify if an instruction appears unlawful
contract expressly prohibits ai or model training use
missing_elements: secondary, incompatible, or unauthorized use is prohibited, including analytics, profiling, advertising, internal improvement, benchmarking, and model training unless separately approved in writing and legally permitted
vendor must preserve notices, consent records, and processing authorization artefacts
vendor must notify the organization and stop changed-scope or changed-lawful-basis processing unless separately instructed in writing
matched_clauses:
4.1 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely for the purpose of providing the Services to Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited and in accordance with the Bank’s documented
instructions communicated in writing, including through authorized email, implementation records, signed
work orders, and support tickets.

4.2 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall not sell, disclose, commercialize, license, or otherwise
exploit Personal Data for its own independent commercial purposes.

4.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine-tune,
benchmark, or validate any artificial intelligence, machine learning, large language, or predictive analytics
model for itself or for any third party.

4.4 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited may use service usage patterns, performance indicators, and
operational insights derived from the Services to improve platform reliability, support quality, and feature
effectiveness, provided that such use is undertaken in a manner consistent with applicable law and good
industry practice.
evidence_snippets: 4.1 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely for the purpose of providing the Services to Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited and in accordance with the Bank’s documented instructions...

4.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine-tune, benchmark, or validate any artificial intelligence, machine learning, large language, or predictive analytics model...

4.4 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited may use service usage patterns, performance indicators, and operational insights derived from the Services to improve platform reliability, support quality, and feature effectiveness...
4.5 If Veridian Process Systems Private Limited believes that an instruction of the Bank may violate applicable law, it shall notify the Bank in writing...

Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely for the purpose of providing the Services to Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited and in accordance with the Bank’s documented instructions communicated in writing...

controls.title: Adequate Security Safeguards
found_elements: reasonable security safeguards are required to prevent personal data breach
encryption, obfuscation, masking, or tokenization controls are required where appropriate
access controls over computer resources are required
logs, monitoring, and review are required for detecting unauthorized access
backup or continued-processing arrangements are required
processor security obligations and technical and organizational measures are required
missing_elements: relevant logs and data are retained for at least one year where required for detection, investigation, remediation, and continuity
matched_clauses:
6.2 Such program shall include administrative, technical, organizational, and physical safeguards designed to
protect Bank Data against unauthorized access, unauthorized disclosure, destruction, loss, alteration, and
misuse.

6.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall implement encryption for Bank Data transmitted over public
networks and shall maintain encryption for Bank Data stored in production databases and managed storage
systems.

6.4 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall maintain role-based access controls, privileged-access
review procedures, secure authentication mechanisms, administrative logging, malware controls, secure
configuration practices, and periodic vulnerability review processes.

13.1 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall maintain business continuity and disaster recovery
arrangements appropriate to the Services.

controls.title: Personal Data Breach Notification and Incident Cooperation
found_elements: vendor must provide ongoing information and updates sufficient for the organization's reporting obligations
vendor must fully cooperate in investigation, impact assessment, containment, remediation, recovery, root-cause-analysis, recurrence prevention, and required notifications
vendor must fully cooperate in investigation, impact assessment, containment, remediation, recovery, root-cause analysis, recurrence prevention, and required notifications
missing_elements: vendor must notify the organization without delay upon actual or suspected personal data breach or security incident
vendor must preserve relevant logs, records, evidence, and affected data
vendor must not suppress, alter, or delete relevant evidence except as strictly required for containment and recovery
matched_clauses:
7.1 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall notify Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited without undue
delay after becoming aware of a Security Incident affecting Bank Data.

7.4 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall provide additional information as it becomes reasonably
available and shall cooperate with the Bank in relation to incident handling.

11.2 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall cooperate in good faith with reasonable requests from the
Bank concerning information security, incident handling, and service operations.

controls.title: Data Principal Rights and Complaint-Handling Assistance
found_elements: vendor may not respond directly without organization approval except where required by law
search retrieval export or suppression support is covered
missing_elements: vendor must assist with data principal requests, complaints, queries, and rights exercises for data processed through its systems or services
assistance covers access, correction, completion, updating, erasure, consent-withdrawal-related changes, grievance handling, and other actions needed for legal compliance
assistance must be provided within timelines specified by the organization and fast enough for legal or regulatory deadlines
assistance extends to nominee-based rights exercise in case of death or incapacity
matched_clauses:
8.1 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall assist Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited in responding to
requests from customers and other data principals relating to access to Personal Data, correction of inaccurate
data, and deletion of Personal Data processed in connection with the Services.

8.2 If Veridian Process Systems Private Limited receives such a request directly, it shall promptly notify the
Bank and shall not respond directly except on the written instruction of the Bank or as required by law.

8.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall provide reasonable cooperation to search for, retrieve,
correct, and delete relevant Personal Data within the hosted environment where required by the Bank.

8.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall provide reasonable cooperation to search for, retrieve,

controls.title: Sub-Processing Restrictions
missing_elements: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization
subprocessors must be bound by equivalent obligations covering data protection, confidentiality, security, purpose limitation, deletion, cooperation, and compliance
vendor remains fully responsible for the acts, omissions, failures, and breaches of subprocessors
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization.

controls.title: Data Deletion / Return and Cessation of Processing
missing_elements: vendor must cease processing on termination, instruction, consent withdrawal where relevant, completion of purpose, or when processing is no longer legally permitted
cessation must occur within a reasonable time and within a clearly stated maximum period
vendor must securely delete or return personal data and copies under its control in accordance with the organization's instructions
continued retention is limited to what is legally required and further unauthorized use is prohibited during retention
vendor must delete retained data once retention is no longer legally required
vendor must provide written confirmation, certification, or equivalent evidence of deletion, return, or restricted retention where required by the organization
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor must cease processing on termination, instruction, consent withdrawal where relevant, completion of purpose, or when processing is no longer legally permitted.

controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, outsourcing risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Cross-Border Transfer and Offshore Access Restrictions
missing_elements: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted
vendor may not self-authorize offshore processing, hosting, support access, or onward transfer arrangements
any approved offshore arrangement remains subject to contractual controls and applicable government or competent-authority requirements
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, outsourcing risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Audit Rights, Evidence Access, and Regulatory Cooperation
missing_elements: organization has meaningful and enforceable rights to assess and verify compliance, not limited to document review only and not subject to vendor veto or open-ended mutual-agreement conditions without workable fallback
vendor must provide access to records, logs, policies, control evidence, systems, personnel, and relevant subprocessor information needed to verify compliance
confidentiality or commercial sensitivity may not block audit scope and must instead be handled through confidentiality undertakings or controlled access
vendor must cooperate with lawful regulatory or supervisory requests connected to the personal data processed under the agreement
matched_clauses:
written directions issued by the Bank.
2. Definitions
For the purposes of this Agreement:
“Bank Data” means all information, files, records, documents, forms, workflow entries, customer
communications, employee records, operational logs, reports, metadata, account-related information, and any
Personal Data processed by Veridian Process Systems Private Limited in connection with the Services.
“Personal Data” means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person that is processed
by Veridian Process Systems Private Limited under this Agreement.
“Services” means the hosted software platform, implementation support, data import functions, case routing
functions, reporting services, storage, maintenance, and support services provided by Veridian Process
Systems Private Limited under this Agreement.

corruption, destruction, loss, misuse, or unavailability of Bank Data or systems used to process Bank Data.
“Subcontractor” means any third party engaged by Veridian Process Systems Private Limited in relation to the
Services.
3. Scope of Services

of providing the Services to Peninsula Mercantile Bank Limited and in accordance with the Bank’s documented
instructions communicated in writing, including through authorized email, implementation records, signed
work orders, and support tickets.
4.2 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall not sell, disclose, commercialize, license, or otherwise
exploit Personal Data for its own independent commercial purposes.
4.3 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, fine-tune,
benchmark, or validate any artificial intelligence, machine learning, large language, or predictive analytics
model for itself or for any third party.
4.4 Veridian Process Systems Private Limited may use service usage patterns, performance indicators, and
operational insights derived from the Services to improve platform reliability, support quality, and feature
effectiveness, provided that such use is undertaken in a manner consistent with applicable law and good
industry practice.
4.5 If Veridian Process Systems Private Limited believes that an instruction of the Bank may violate applicable
law, it shall notify the Bank in writing before carrying out such instruction unless prohibited by law from doing
so.

found_elements: vendor must support update, correction, completion, synchronization, suppression, or erasure of inaccurate, incomplete, misleading, stale, or unauthorized data within its systems

missing_elements: vendor must support corresponding corrective action across subprocessors or linked processing environments where applicable

controls.title: Data Localisation / Processing Location and Sector-Specific Data Residency Compliance
missing_elements: all covered data, logs, backups, recordings, derived data, support-access data, and metadata must be stored, hosted, mirrored, backed up, retained, routed, accessed, and processed only within India
the India-only obligation applies to subprocessors, cloud providers, support providers, affiliates, and downstream parties
offshore transfer, offshore subprocessors, offshore support access, foreign cloud-region usage, and remote access from outside India are prohibited absent separate documented approval
processing, hosting, backup, support-access, disaster-recovery, and cloud-region locations must be disclosed
prior written notification and approval are required before any location or arrangement change

key_gaps: Data Fiduciary / Data Processor Role Clarity: organization is the data fiduciary or equivalent principal controller

Strict Purpose Limitation and Lawful Instruction Control: secondary, incompatible, or unauthorized use is prohibited, including analytics, profiling, advertising, internal improvement, benchmarking, and model training unless separately approved in writing and legally permitted
Adequate Security Safeguards: relevant logs and data are retained for at least one year where required for detection, investigation, remediation, and continuity
Personal Data Breach Notification and Incident Cooperation: vendor must notify the organization without delay upon actual or suspected personal data breach or security incident
Data Principal Rights and Complaint-Handling Assistance: vendor must assist with data principal requests, complaints, queries, and rights exercises for data processed through its systems or services
Sub-Processing Restrictions: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization
